serp_results.title: Interview With Evgeniia Megrian: FromStartupFoundertoAdvisor
serp_results.snippet: Evgeniia Megrian is afounder-turned-business developmentadvisorwho has bootstrapped an EdTechstartup, scaling it quickly to £100K in annual revenue and successfully exiting. Since then, she has worked with companies like Xsolla, Vivid Money and Ultimate Guitar, helping them...
